case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. HERMAN ARCINO ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCINO, HERMAN AN INDIVIDUAL $4,954.97 PRINCIPAL, $470.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,424.97, SEE SCANNED DOC

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62881210) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ARCINO, HERMAN AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100033632), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC SERVED APR-25-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-28-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT ARCINO, HERMAN AN INDIVIDUAL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ARCINO, HERMAN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-10-2018
DECLARATION REGARDING STATEMENT OF VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 100032681) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62881210) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
